ddls:
CREATE TABLE "genes" (
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gene */,
  "gene_name" TEXT /* Name of the gene */,
  "protein_name" TEXT /* Name of the protein encoded by the gene */,
  "ko_id" TEXT /* KEGG orthology (KO) ID for the gene */,
  "ko_description" TEXT /* Description of the KO ID */,
  "probe_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the probe used to detect the gene */,
  "organism_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organism to which the gene belongs */,
  "gene_length" INTEGER /* Length of the gene in base pairs */,
  "chromosome" TEXT /* Chromosome on which the gene is located */,
  "start_position" INTEGER /* Start position of the gene on the chromosome */,
  "end_position" INTEGER /* End position of the gene on the chromosome */,
  "strand" TEXT /* Strand on which the gene is located */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the gene record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the gene record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pathways" (
  "pathway_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pathway */,
  "pathway_name" TEXT /* Name of the metabolic pathway */,
  "pathway_description" TEXT /* Description of the metabolic pathway */,
  "organism_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organism to which the pathway belongs */,
  "pathway_type" TEXT /* Type of the pathway (e.g., biosynthesis, metabolism, signaling) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the pathway record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the pathway record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pathway_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "light_dependency" TEXT /* Light dependency of the experiment (e.g., L for light-dependent, D for light-independent) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project to which the experiment belongs */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the experiment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the experiment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the experiment record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the experiment record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "expression_data" (
  "expression_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expression data entry */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "log_all" REAL /* Log of the expression level across all time points */,
  "log_3_day" REAL /* Log of the expression level at 3-day time point */,
  "log_6_day" REAL /* Log of the expression level at 6-day time point */,
  "expression_level" TEXT /* Expression level (e.g., Me for medium, Hi for high) */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project to which the expression data belongs */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the dataset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the expression data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the expression data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expression_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expression_data_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expression_data_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team to which the user belongs */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "expression_id" INTEGER /* ID of the expression data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project to which the access log belongs */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser or tool used */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the access log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_expression_id FOREIGN KEY ("expression_id") REFERENCES expression_data ("expression_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_pathway_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gene-pathway mapping */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene */,
  "pathway_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metabolic pathway */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the gene-pathway mapping was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the gene-pathway mapping was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_pathway_mapping_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_pathway_mapping_pathway_id FOREIGN KEY ("pathway_id") REFERENCES pathways ("pathway_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "expression_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each condition */,
  "expression_id" INTEGER /* ID of the expression data */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the condition (e.g., DD3, LL3, DL3) */,
  "condition_value" REAL /* Value of the condition (e.g., expression level) */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project to which the expression condition belongs */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the expression condition record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the expression condition record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expression_conditions_expression_id FOREIGN KEY ("expression_id") REFERENCES expression_data ("expression_id")
)
